economic_notes: Gitga'at Economic Limited Partnership (100% owned, modified equity method) generated net income of $1,379,812. Investments in North Co-Corp Ferry Services Ltd (33%), Great Bear Carbon Credit Limited Partnership (6%), Coastal Nations Fisheries LP (7%). Ocean Destiny Joint Venture proportionately consolidated at 50%. COVID-19 impacted operations with increased government funding and additional costs.
notes: Fiscal year ended March 31, 2022 (not 2024). Prior year figures restated due to correction of error - Gitga'at Forestry Inc. was incorrectly accounted for using modified equity basis instead of being consolidated. Consolidated entities include Gitga'at Development Corporation, Gitga'at Land Holdings Ltd., Gitga'at Forestry Inc., and Ocean Destiny Joint Venture (50% proportionate consolidation). Gitga'at Economic Limited Partnership accounted for by modified equity method with December 31 year-end. No schedule of remuneration provided in the extracted text. OSR calculated as total revenue minus all government transfers (ISC + FNHA + Province of BC + DFO = $9,731,988); osr = $21,819,615 - $9,731,988 = $12,087,627 which includes earnings from business entities, own source revenue, rental income, interest, admin fees etc.
